projects.title: MezzeDocuments Content System
projects.description: Developed an in-house system that transforms static PDFs into structured, interactive in-app content for improved usability and content delivery.
highlights: Built an internal content generation workflow for MezzeDocuments
Transformed static PDF content into structured in-app pages
Improved content delivery efficiency with modular architecture and caching

projects.title: Financial Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: NLP-based sentiment analysis using BERT/FinBERT on financial data sources, with a dashboard for trends and decision support.
highlights: Built an NLP-based sentiment analysis system using BERT/FinBERT
Evaluated model performance using accuracy, F1 score, and RMSE
Developed a dashboard to visualise sentiment trends and support financial decision-making

projects.title: Machine Learning Model for Time-Series Prediction
projects.description: Designed and evaluated neural network models for time-series prediction in Python.
highlights: Designed and evaluated neural network models for time-series prediction
Built an end-to-end machine learning pipeline including preprocessing, feature engineering, and evaluation

projects.title: Productivity & Knowledge Management System
projects.description: Led a 6-person team to design and deliver a full-stack system using React, MySQL, and GCP (team lead).
highlights: Led a 6-person team to design and deliver a full-stack system
Delivered ahead of schedule while managing a large project scope
Applied Agile methodology with Jira to manage sprints, tasks, and requirements
Developed scalable features including task management and data-driven dashboards

projects.title: Marketing Automation Tools
projects.description: Python automation for outreach and web scraping, improving operational efficiency at Loads of Traffic.
highlights: Streamlined outreach and scraping workflows by replacing manual steps
Removed unnecessary process stages to improve scalability
Used data-driven analysis to support affiliate decision-making
Combined technical delivery with commercial insight for measurable productivity gains
